member.summary: Кешированный формат пикселя сохраненного Bitmap/JPEG.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.BitmapInfo.BmpLock(System.Int32)
member.summary: Блокировка доступа к разделяемому ресурсу (порождает исключение по таймауту).
member.remarks: Типичная схема использования: 1: .BmpLock() 'Не оборачиваем Try-Catch: может вызвать исключение таймаута и в Finally вызовет в итоге лишний .BmpUnlock() 2: Try 3: ... 'Этот код может вызвать исключения, но если дошли до него - ресурс был получен на .BmpLock() - исключения не было 4: Catch ex As Exception 5: ... 'Обработали исключения кода как требуется... 6: Finally 7: .BmpUnlock() '...и в итоге освободили доступ к разделяемому ресурсу 8: End Try

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.BitmapInfo.BmpUnlock
member.summary: Освобождение доступа к разделяемому ресурсу (при попытке выполнить на свободном ресурсе дает исключение).

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.BitmapInfo.Compress(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Обеспечивает экономию ОЗУ: 1 - При наличии Bitmap-а и отсутствии JPEG-а: формируем JPEG на основе Bitmap-а. 2 - При наличии Bitmap-а и наличии JPEG-а: элиминирование Bitmap-а и переустановка JPEG-а.
member.remarks: Q=90 - высокое качество с сохранением мелких деталей и цветных градиентов. Q=80 - высокое качество с сохранением мелких деталей. Q=60 - приемлемое качество для технических целей (дальше размер падает медленнее и растут артефакты). Q=50 - качество отладочного канала.
member.param: Уровень качества JPEG.
Таймаут блокировки доступа к разделяемому ресурсу.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.BitmapInfo.GetJpg(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Возвращает JPEG-данные.
member.param: Сформировать JPEG на основе Bitmap-а (если JPEG-потока нет).
Уровень качества JPEG.
Таймаут блокировки доступа к разделяемому ресурсу.
member.remarks: Формирование JPEG на основе Bitmap-а при вызове данного метода при активном флаге ifEmptyCreateFromBitmap не приводит к установке внутреннего JPEG-потока или элиминированию исходного Bitmap-а. Если требуется сжать Bitmap, установить JPEG-поток и затем освободить память от Bitmap-а - используйте метод Compress().

member.remarks: Несмотря на то, что при вызове этого метода, возможно, есть "висящий" отложенный Dispose для Bitmap-а, у каждого такого вызова своя цель, и ложного элиминирования не будет.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.BitmapInfo.BitmapDisposeWithDelay(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,System.Single)
member.summary: Запуск потока отложенного Dispose для битмапа.
member.param: Время доступности декомпрессированного битмапа.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.BitmapInfo.DisposeBmpInternal(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Метод для элиминирования определенного битмапа.
member.param: Целевой Bitmap (элиминирование другой цели невозможно).
member.remarks: Если не отслеживать цель для элиминирования, может случиться ситуация, когда объект будет инициализирован JPEG-ом, с него будет запрошен Bitmap, запустится отложенные элиминирование после декомпресии, и далее пользователь обработает декомпрессированное изображение, которое будет установлено, а далее стерто отложенным Dispose()-ом. При отслеживании ссылки-цели элиминируется в точности тот Bitmap, что и планировалось.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.HSV.HueDistance(System.Double,System.Double)

member.remarks: Наибольшее возможное расстояние в пространстве Hue - это 0.5 [0..1], которое сооотв. противоположному цвету. Если получили больше 0.5, нужно нормализовывать результат.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.BitmapOperations.LoadBitmap(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Loads pixel data from an SKBitmap into the internal raw bytes array.
member.param: The source SKBitmap to load data from. Supports Gray8, Bgra8888, and Rgba8888 formats.
member.remarks: For color images (BGRA/RGBA), the alpha channel is stripped and data is stored as 3-channel BGR. For grayscale images (Gray8), data is stored as-is in 1-channel format.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.BitmapOperations.GetBitmap
member.summary: Creates an SKBitmap from the internal raw bytes array.
member.returns: A new SKBitmap containing the pixel data. Grayscale data creates Gray8 format, color data creates Bgra8888 format.
member.remarks: For grayscale (1-channel), creates Gray8 bitmap directly. For color (3-channel BGR), creates Bgra8888 bitmap with alpha set to 255 (opaque).

member.name: T:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.RawFrame
member.summary: Универсальный формат сырого кадра.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKEncoder.DecodeJpeg(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decodes a JPEG image from a byte array into an SKBitmap, ensuring the appropriate color format based on the image's channel count.
member.remarks: If the JPEG image has a single channel, it is decoded as Gray8; otherwise, it is decoded as Bgra8888. If the channel count cannot be determined, the default decoder is used, and the resulting bitmap is ensured to have a color format.
member.param: The byte array containing the JPEG image data to decode. Cannot be null.
member.returns: An SKBitmap representing the decoded JPEG image, using either the Bgra8888 or Gray8 color format depending on the image's channel count.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKEncoder.GetJpegSize(System.Byte[],System.Int32@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Извлечение размера изображения из JPEG-потока без его декодирования.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKEncoder.GetBitmapSize(System.Byte[],System.Int32@)
member.summary: Get size and channel count from a bitmap image for correct decode

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKEncoder.GetPngSize(System.Byte[],System.Int32@)
member.summary: Get size and channel count from a png image for correct decode

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKEncoder.EnsureColor(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Ensures that the specified bitmap is in a color format, converting it if necessary.
member.remarks: If the source bitmap is detected as grayscale, it is converted to a color format using a new bitmap. If the source is already in the correct color format, it is returned as is. The conversion process uses a canvas to draw the original bitmap onto a new bitmap with the target color type.
member.param: The source bitmap to check and convert if required. Cannot be null.
member.returns: A bitmap in the appropriate color format. Returns null if the source bitmap is null.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKEncoder.CheckIfGrayscaleFast(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified bitmap image is grayscale by analyzing a downscaled version of the image.
member.remarks: This method performs a fast analysis by scaling the original image to a smaller size and checking the color channel differences for each pixel. A threshold of 2 is used to account for minor variations introduced by compression or scaling. This approach provides a balance between performance and accuracy for grayscale detection.
member.param: The bitmap image to analyze. This parameter must not be null.
The width and height, in pixels, of the downscaled image used for analysis. Must be a positive integer.
member.returns: true if the bitmap is determined to be grayscale; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKExtensions.SKRectFromPointSize(SkiaSharp.SKPoint,SkiaSharp.SKSize)
member.summary: Creates a rectangle that is defined by a specified top-left point and size.
member.param: The point that specifies the coordinates of the rectangle's top-left corner.
The size that specifies the width and height of the rectangle.
member.returns: An SKRect structure that represents the rectangle defined by the specified point and size.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKExtensions.SKRectFromXYWH(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a rectangle defined by the specified top-left corner and dimensions.
member.remarks: The width and height parameters must be non-negative. Supplying negative values may result in an invalid rectangle.
member.param: The x-coordinate of the rectangle's top-left corner.
The y-coordinate of the rectangle's top-left corner.
The width of the rectangle, in pixels. Must be a non-negative value.
The height of the rectangle, in pixels. Must be a non-negative value.
member.returns: An SKRect that represents the rectangle defined by the specified coordinates and dimensions.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKExtensions.SKRectIFromPointSize(SkiaSharp.SKPointI,SkiaSharp.SKSizeI)
member.summary: Creates a rectangle with integer coordinates and size, using the specified top-left point and dimensions.
member.param: The point that defines the top-left corner of the rectangle.
The size that specifies the width and height of the rectangle.
member.returns: An SKRectI structure representing the rectangle defined by the given point and size.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKExtensions.SKRectIFromXYWH(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new SKRectI structure that represents a rectangle defined by the specified position and dimensions.
member.remarks: The width and height parameters must be non-negative; otherwise, the resulting rectangle may not be valid.
member.param: The x-coordinate of the rectangle's top-left corner.
The y-coordinate of the rectangle's top-left corner.
The width of the rectangle, in pixels. Must be a non-negative value.
The height of the rectangle, in pixels. Must be a non-negative value.
member.returns: An SKRectI structure representing the rectangle defined by the specified coordinates and dimensions.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKExtensions.CloneResized(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,SkiaSharp.SKSize)
member.summary: Creates a new bitmap that is a resized version of the specified bitmap, using the given target size.
member.param: The original bitmap to resize. This parameter cannot be null.
The target size for the new bitmap, specified as an structure. The width and height must be positive values.
member.returns: A new instance that represents the resized bitmap.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKExtensions.CloneResized(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new bitmap that is a resized version of the specified bitmap using cubic resampling for improved image quality.
member.remarks: The resizing operation uses the Mitchell cubic resampling algorithm to enhance the quality of the output image. The original bitmap's color type and alpha type are retained in the resized bitmap.
member.param: The source bitmap to resize. This parameter must not be null.
The width, in pixels, of the resulting resized bitmap. Must be greater than zero.
The height, in pixels, of the resulting resized bitmap. Must be greater than zero.
member.returns: A new SKBitmap instance that represents the resized version of the original bitmap, preserving the color type and alpha type.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKExtensions.RotateFlip(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKRotateFlipType)
member.summary: Rotates and flips the specified bitmap according to the given transformation type.
member.remarks: This method modifies the bitmap in place. Ensure that the bitmap is properly initialized before calling this method.
member.param: The bitmap to transform. This parameter cannot be null.
The type of rotation and flip operation to apply to the bitmap.

member.name: T:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKFontFamily
member.summary: Defines a set of generic font families that can be used for rendering text in SkiaSharp.

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKFontFamily.GenericSerif
member.summary: Specifies a generic serif font family.
member.remarks: A serif font is a typeface that has small lines or decorative strokes (called "serifs") at the ends of the main strokes of the characters. Examples of serif fonts include Times New Roman, Georgia, and Garamond.

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKFontFamily.GenericSansSerif
member.summary: Gets the generic sans-serif font family used for rendering text.
member.remarks: This font family is typically used for displaying text in a clean and modern style, suitable for various applications.

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKFontFamily.GenericMonospace
member.summary: Represents a generic monospace font style used for displaying text in a fixed-width format.
member.remarks: This font style is typically used in code editors and terminal applications to ensure that each character occupies the same amount of horizontal space, aiding in readability and alignment of text.

member.name: T:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKFontLoader
member.summary: Provides methods for loading and retrieving SKTypeface objects associated with specific font families.
member.remarks: This class manages a cache of SKTypeface objects for performance, ensuring that font resources are efficiently loaded and accessed throughout the application. It is intended for internal use and is not accessible outside the containing assembly.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKFontLoader.#cctor
member.summary: Initializes static resources for the FontLoader class before any static members are accessed or any instances are created.
member.remarks: This static constructor ensures that the default font families are loaded into the font cache and are available for use throughout the application. It is invoked automatically by the runtime and does not need to be called directly.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKFontLoader.GetSKTypeface(Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKFontFamily)
member.summary: Retrieves the SKTypeface associated with the specified font family.
member.remarks: This method accesses a cached SKTypeface for performance.
member.param: The font family for which to retrieve the SKTypeface. This parameter must not be null.
member.returns: The SKTypeface corresponding to the specified font family.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKFontLoader.GetFont(Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKFontFamily)
member.summary: Getting SKTypeface from embedded resources
member.param: Font family to load
member.returns: SKTypeface loaded from embedded resource

member.name: T:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringAlignment
member.summary: Defines the alignment options for text rendering in SkiaSharp.

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringAlignment.Near
member.summary: Specifies the text be aligned near the layout. In a left-to-right layout, the near position is left. In a right-to-left layout, the near position is right.

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringAlignment.Center
member.summary: Specifies that text is aligned in the center of the layout rectangle.

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringAlignment.Far
member.summary: Specifies that text is aligned far from the origin position of the layout rectangle. In a left-to-right layout, the far position is right. In a right-to-left layout, the far position is left.

member.name: T:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringFormat
member.summary: Represents the formatting options for rendering text, including alignment, line alignment, and trimming behavior.

member.name: P:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringFormat.Alignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the horizontal alignment of the text. The default value is SKStringAlignment.Near, which aligns the text to the left.

member.name: P:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringFormat.LineAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the vertical alignment of the text. The default value is SKStringAlignment.Near, which aligns the text to the top.

member.name: P:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringFormat.Trimming
member.summary: Gets or sets the trimming behavior of the text. The default value is SKStringTrimming.None, which means no trimming is applied.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringFormat.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SKStringFormat class with default values.

member.name: T:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringTrimming
member.summary: Defines the trimming options for text rendering in SkiaSharp.

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringTrimming.None
member.summary: Specifies no trimming

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringTrimming.Character
member.summary: Specifies that the text is trimmed to the nearest character

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringTrimming.Word
member.summary: Specifies that text is trimmed to the nearest word

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringTrimming.EllipsisCharacter
member.summary: Specifies that the text is trimmed to the nearest character, and an ellipsis is inserted at the end of a trimmed line.

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringTrimming.EllipsisWord
member.summary: Specifies that text is trimmed to the nearest word, and an ellipsis is inserted at the end of a trimmed line.

member.name: F:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringTrimming.EllipsisPath
member.summary: Specifies that the center is removed from trimmed lines and replaced by an ellipsis. The algorithm keeps as much of the last slash-delimited segment of the line as possible.

member.name: T:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for SKCanvas to facilitate text rendering with various formatting and layout options

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.CreateSKRect(SkiaSharp.SKPoint,SkiaSharp.SKSize)
member.summary: Creates an SKRect from a given point and size, where the point represents the top-left corner of the rectangle.

The size of the rectangle.
member.returns: A new SKRect instance.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.WrapText(System.String,System.Single,SkiaSharp.SKFont,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wraps text into multiple lines that fit within the specified width.
member.param: The text to wrap.
The maximum width for each line.
The font object used to measure text.
If , words longer than are split character-by-character; otherwise they are kept intact (potentially exceeding the width).
member.returns: A list of text lines.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.CalculateFontSizeToFit(System.String,SkiaSharp.SKTypeface,SkiaSharp.SKSize)
member.summary:
Finds the largest font size such that fits within using binary search. The behavior depends on which dimensions are specified:
Only width specified: fits text as a single line within the width.
Only height specified: fits text as a single line within the height.
Both dimensions specified: fits multi-line wrapped text within both width and height.
member.param: The text to measure.
The typeface to use for rendering the text.
The area the rendered text must fit within. At least one dimension must be greater than zero.
member.returns: The largest font size in pixels that fits the text within the specified constraints, or 0 if fitting is impossible.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.SetFontSizePoints(SkiaSharp.SKFont,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the font size of the specified SKFont instance in pixels, converting from the provided points size.
member.remarks: The method converts the points size (i.e. System.Drawing.Common way) to pixels using a factor of 96 divided by 72, which aligns with standard font size conversions between points and pixels.
member.param: The SKFont instance whose font size will be updated.
The font size in points to be converted to pixels and applied to the SKFont.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawText(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.String,SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Draws the specified text on the canvas at the given coordinates using the provided font and color.
member.remarks: The text is drawn starting at the specified (x, y) coordinates. The position corresponds to the origin point for the text layout.
member.param: The SKCanvas on which to render the text.
The text string to draw. If null, no text is rendered.
The SKFont that defines the typeface and size for the text.
The SKColor to use when rendering the text.
The x-coordinate, in pixels, of the text's starting position.
The y-coordinate, in pixels, of the text's starting position.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawText(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Draws the specified text on the canvas at the given coordinates using the provided font and color.
member.remarks: This method provides a simplified way to draw text at a specific point on the canvas. The text is positioned using the top-left corner of its bounding box at the specified coordinates.
member.param: The SKCanvas on which to draw the text. Must be initialized before calling this method.
A read-only span of characters representing the text to be drawn.
The SKFont that defines the style and size of the text.
The SKColor to use when rendering the text.
The x-coordinate, in pixels, of the position where the text will be drawn.
The y-coordinate, in pixels, of the position where the text will be drawn.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawText(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.String,SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,SkiaSharp.SKPoint)
member.summary: Draws the specified text on the canvas at the given position using the provided font and color.
member.remarks: This method provides a simplified way to render text at a specific point by automatically creating a layout rectangle based on the provided position.
member.param: The canvas on which to draw the text.
The text string to draw. If null, no text is rendered.
The font that defines the style and size of the text.
The color to use when rendering the text.
The position, in canvas coordinates, where the text will be drawn.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawText(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,SkiaSharp.SKPoint)
member.summary: Draws the specified text at the given position on the canvas using the provided font and color.
member.remarks: This method provides a simplified way to render text at a specific point without requiring a bounding rectangle. The text is positioned based on the provided point.
member.param: The canvas on which to draw the text.
A read-only span of characters representing the text to be drawn.
The font that defines the style and size of the text.
The color to use when rendering the text.
The position, in canvas coordinates, where the text will be drawn.

member.summary: Draws the specified text at the given coordinates on the canvas using the provided font and color.
member.remarks: This overload simplifies text drawing by allowing you to specify a position directly, rather than a bounding rectangle. The text is positioned based on the provided coordinates.
member.param: The canvas on which to draw the text.
The text string to draw. If null, no text is rendered.
The font that defines the style and size of the text.
The color to use when drawing the text.
The x-coordinate of the text's position on the canvas.
The y-coordinate of the text's position on the canvas.
An optional formatting object that specifies layout and alignment options for the text.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawText(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,System.Single,System.Single,Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringFormat)
member.summary: Draws the specified text at the given coordinates on the canvas using the provided font and color.
member.remarks: This method draws text at a specific point on the canvas without specifying a bounding rectangle. Ensure that the canvas is properly initialized before calling this method.
member.param: The canvas on which to draw the text.
A read-only span of characters representing the text to be drawn.
The font that defines the style and size of the text.
The color to use when rendering the text.
The x-coordinate of the position where the text will be drawn.
The y-coordinate of the position where the text will be drawn.
An optional formatting object that specifies additional text layout options. May be null.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawText(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.String,SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,SkiaSharp.SKPoint,Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringFormat)
member.summary: Draws the specified text at the given position on the canvas using the provided font and color.
member.remarks: If the text string is null, this method does not render any text. The text is drawn with the specified font and color at the provided point on the canvas.
member.param: The SKCanvas on which to draw the text.
The text string to draw. If null, no text is rendered.
The SKFont that defines the typeface and size of the text.
The SKColor used to render the text.
The SKPoint specifying the position where the text will be drawn.
An optional SKStringFormat that specifies text formatting options. Can be null.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawText(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,SkiaSharp.SKPoint,Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringFormat)
member.summary: Draws the specified text at a given point on the canvas using the provided font and color.
member.remarks: This method draws text at the specified point without requiring a bounding rectangle. The text will be rendered using the provided font and color. If additional formatting is needed, supply a non-null format parameter.
member.param: The canvas on which to draw the text. Cannot be null.
A read-only span of characters representing the text to draw.
The font that defines the style and size of the text. Cannot be null.
The color to use when drawing the text.
The location on the canvas where the text will be drawn.
An optional formatting object that specifies text layout options. May be null.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawText(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.String,SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,SkiaSharp.SKRect)
member.summary: Draws the specified text onto the given canvas using the provided font and color within the specified layout rectangle.
member.remarks: This method provides a simplified interface for drawing text on a canvas. It internally calls an overload that allows for additional customization.
member.param: The canvas on which to draw the text.
The text string to draw. If null, no text is rendered.
The font that defines the style and size of the text.
The color to use when drawing the text.
The rectangle that defines the area in which the text will be drawn. The text is clipped to this rectangle if it exceeds its bounds.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawText(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,SkiaSharp.SKRect)
member.summary: Draws the specified text onto the canvas using the given font and color, positioning it within the specified layout rectangle.
member.remarks: Ensure that the layout rectangle is appropriately sized to contain the rendered text. The method does not perform text wrapping or clipping beyond the bounds of the specified rectangle.
member.param: The SKCanvas on which to draw the text.
A read-only span of characters representing the text to render.
The SKFont that defines the typeface, size, and style for the text.
The SKColor to use when rendering the text.
The SKRect that specifies the area in which the text will be laid out and drawn.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawText(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.String,SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,SkiaSharp.SKRect,Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringFormat)
member.summary: Draws the specified text onto the given canvas using the provided font and color, constrained within the specified layout rectangle.
member.param: The SKCanvas on which the text will be drawn.
The string to be drawn. If null, no text will be rendered.
The SKFont that defines the style and size of the text.
The SKColor that specifies the color of the text.
The SKRect that defines the area within which the text will be drawn. The text may be clipped if it exceeds this area.
An optional SKStringFormat that specifies how the text should be formatted, such as alignment and line spacing.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawText(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,SkiaSharp.SKRect,Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringFormat)
member.summary: Draws the specified text onto the provided canvas using the given font and color, positioning it within the defined layout rectangle and applying optional formatting.
member.remarks: This method enables custom text rendering on a canvas, allowing for precise control over layout and formatting. Use the format parameter to adjust alignment or text direction as needed.
member.param: The SKCanvas on which to draw the text.
A read-only span of characters representing the text to render.
The SKFont that specifies the typeface, size, and style for the text.
The SKColor used to paint the text.
The SKRect that defines the area in which the text will be laid out and drawn.
An optional SKStringFormat that specifies text formatting options such as alignment and direction. If null, default formatting is applied.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.DrawTextInternal(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKColor,SkiaSharp.SKRect,Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringFormat)
member.summary: Draws the specified text onto the given canvas using the provided font and color, positioning and formatting it within the specified layout rectangle according to the given string format options.
member.remarks: This method supports multi-line text, word wrapping, alignment, and trimming within the specified rectangle. If the text exceeds the available space, it is trimmed or wrapped according to the provided format. Subpixel rendering and full hinting are enabled for improved text clarity.
member.param: The SKCanvas on which to render the text.
A read-only span of characters representing the text to be drawn.
The SKFont that defines the typeface, size, and rendering options for the text.
The SKColor used to render the text.
The SKRect that specifies the area within which the text will be drawn and aligned.
An optional SKStringFormat that determines text alignment, line alignment, and trimming behavior. If null, default alignment and no trimming are used.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.ComputeLineX(System.String,SkiaSharp.SKFont,SkiaSharp.SKRect,System.Single,Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringAlignment,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates the X-coordinate at which to render the specified text within a layout rectangle, taking into account alignment, padding, and whether the text width should be considered.
member.param: The text to be measured and positioned within the layout rectangle.
The font used to measure the width of the text.
The rectangle that defines the area in which the text will be rendered.
The amount of horizontal padding to apply when positioning the text within the layout rectangle.
The alignment of the text within the layout rectangle. Determines how the text is positioned horizontally (for example, centered or aligned to the far edge).
A value indicating whether the width of the text should be considered when calculating its position. If false, the calculation does not account for the text width.
member.returns: The calculated X-coordinate for rendering the text, based on the specified alignment, padding, and layout rectangle.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.ApplyTrimming(System.String,System.Single,SkiaSharp.SKFont,Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKStringTrimming)
member.summary: Trims the specified text to ensure it fits within the given maximum width, using the provided font and trimming style.
member.remarks: If the input text does not exceed the specified width, it is returned as-is. The method supports multiple trimming styles, including options that append an ellipsis or trim by word or character.
member.param: The text to be trimmed to fit within the specified width.
The maximum width, in pixels, that the resulting text should occupy.
The font used to measure the width of the text and determine how trimming is applied.
The trimming style to apply, which specifies how the text should be shortened (for example, by character, by word, or with an ellipsis).
member.returns: A string containing the trimmed version of the input text that fits within the specified maximum width. If the text already fits, it is returned unchanged. The result may include an ellipsis if the trimming style specifies it.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.TrimToCharacter(System.String,System.Single,SkiaSharp.SKFont,System.String)
member.summary: Trims the specified text so that its rendered width does not exceed the given maximum width, appending the specified suffix to the result.
member.remarks: If the entire text fits within the maximum width, the full text is returned with the suffix appended. The method does not account for the width of the suffix when determining how much of the text can fit.
member.param: The text to be trimmed based on the maximum allowed rendered width.
The maximum width, in pixels, that the rendered text and suffix can occupy.
The font used to measure the rendered width of the text.
The string to append to the trimmed text.
member.returns: A string containing the longest leading substring of the input text that fits within the specified width when rendered with the given font, followed by the specified suffix.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.TrimToWord(System.String,System.Single,SkiaSharp.SKFont,System.String)
member.summary: Trims the specified text to fit within the given maximum width when rendered with the provided font, preserving whole words where possible and appending a suffix if truncation occurs.
member.remarks: If no complete words fit within the maximum width, the method falls back to trimming the text at the character level. The result will always fit within the specified width when rendered with the given font.
member.param: The text to be trimmed to fit within the specified width.
The maximum width, in pixels, that the resulting text should occupy when rendered with the specified font. Must be greater than zero.
The font used to measure the width of the text. Cannot be null.
The string to append to the trimmed text if truncation is necessary, such as an ellipsis.
member.returns: A string containing the trimmed text that fits within the specified width, followed by the suffix if truncation occurs.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.SKTextExtensions.TrimPath(System.String,System.Single,SkiaSharp.SKFont,System.String)
member.summary: Trims a file or directory path to fit within a specified maximum width, appending an ellipsis if necessary to indicate omitted sections.
member.remarks: If the path fits within the specified width, it is returned unchanged. Otherwise, the method attempts to preserve the last segment of the path and uses a symmetric middle trim as a fallback to ensure the result fits within the given width.
member.param: The full path string to be trimmed.
The maximum width, in pixels, that the resulting string should occupy.
The font used to measure the width of the text and ellipsis.
The string to append to the trimmed path when it exceeds the maximum width.
member.returns: A string representing the trimmed path that fits within the specified maximum width, including the ellipsis if trimming occurred.

member.name: T:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.RawFrameFunctions
member.summary: Provides functions for converting raw HDR (High Dynamic Range) frame data to displayable SKBitmap images.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.RawFrameFunctions.ConvertRawToHDRBitmap1(System.Int32[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts raw HDR frame data to an SKBitmap with gain adjustment and tone mapping.
member.param: Raw pixel data as int array in RGB format (B, G, R triplets).
Width of the image in pixels.
Height of the image in pixels.
Base gain value for exposure adjustment. Values <= 4 reduce exposure, values > 4 increase exposure.
member.returns: An SKBitmap containing the tone-mapped HDR image.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.RawFrameFunctions.ConvertRawToHDRBitmap1Fast(System.Int32[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Optimized version of ConvertRawToHDRBitmap1 with conditional logic moved outside the main loop.
member.param: Raw pixel data as int array in RGB format (B, G, R triplets).
Width of the image in pixels.
Height of the image in pixels.
Base gain value for exposure adjustment. Values <= 4 reduce exposure, values > 4 increase exposure.
member.returns: An SKBitmap containing the tone-mapped HDR image.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.RawFrameFunctions.InitPowTableHDR3
member.summary: Initializes the lookup table for HDR tone mapping using a power function.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.RawFrameFunctions.ConvertRawToHDRBitmap3Fast(System.Int32[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Fast HDR conversion using a pre-computed power function lookup table with parallel processing.
member.param: Raw pixel data as int array in RGB format (B, G, R triplets).
Width of the image in pixels.
Height of the image in pixels.
member.returns: An SKBitmap containing the tone-mapped HDR image.

member.name: T:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions
member.summary: Provides a set of unsafe functions for performing low-level image processing operations on SKBitmap objects. These functions utilize direct memory access to manipulate pixel data efficiently.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.Crop(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,SkiaSharp.SKRectI)
member.summary: Crops a specified rectangular region from the provided bitmap and returns a new bitmap containing the cropped area.
member.remarks: The cropped bitmap will have the same color type and alpha type as the source bitmap. Ensure that the crop rectangle does not exceed the dimensions of the source bitmap to avoid undefined behavior.
member.param: The source bitmap from which the region will be cropped. This parameter must not be null.
The rectangle, in pixel coordinates, that defines the area to crop from the source bitmap. The rectangle must be fully contained within the bounds of the source bitmap.
member.returns: A new SKBitmap containing the pixels from the specified rectangular region of the source bitmap.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.Patch(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,SkiaSharp.SKRectI)
member.summary: Copies pixel data from the source bitmap to the specified rectangular region of the target bitmap.
member.param: The source bitmap containing the pixel data to copy. Cannot be null. Must have the same color type and alpha type as the target bitmap.
The target bitmap to which the pixel data will be copied. Cannot be null. Must have the same color type and alpha type as the source bitmap.
The rectangular region within the target bitmap where the pixel data from the source bitmap will be applied. The width and height of this region must match the dimensions of the source bitmap.
member.exception: Thrown if the source and target bitmaps do not have the same color type and alpha type, or if the dimensions of the source bitmap do not match the width and height of the specified region.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.Sharpen5(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Applies a sharpening filter to the specified bitmap image, enhancing its details.
member.remarks: The sharpening effect is applied using a predefined algorithm that enhances the edges in the image.
member.param: The source bitmap image to be sharpened. Must not be null.
member.returns: A new SKBitmap containing the sharpened version of the source image.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.Sharpen5(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Applies a sharpening filter to the source bitmap and stores the result in the target bitmap.
member.remarks: This method supports grayscale and color bitmaps. Ensure that both bitmaps are locked during processing to avoid concurrency issues.
member.param: The source bitmap to be sharpened. Must not be null and must have the same color type and dimensions as the target bitmap.
The target bitmap where the sharpened result will be stored. Must not be null and must have the same color type and dimensions as the source bitmap.
member.exception: Thrown if the source and target bitmaps do not have the same color type, alpha type, or dimensions.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.Sharpen5Gray(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Applies a sharpening filter to a grayscale image using a 5x5 kernel.
member.remarks: This method processes the image in parallel for improved performance. It modifies the target bitmap directly based on the pixel values of the source bitmap.
member.param: The source bitmap from which the grayscale image is read. This bitmap must have a valid pixel format compatible with the sharpening operation.
The target bitmap where the sharpened grayscale image will be written. This bitmap must be of the same dimensions as the source bitmap.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.Sharpen5Color(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Applies a sharpening filter to the source bitmap and stores the result in the target bitmap using a 5x5 kernel.
member.remarks: This method uses a parallel processing approach to enhance performance. It converts the RGB values to YUV for processing and then back to RGB. Ensure that the target bitmap is properly initialized before calling this method.
member.param: The source bitmap to be sharpened. This bitmap must be in a format compatible with the sharpening operation.
The target bitmap where the sharpened result will be stored. It must have the same dimensions and format as the source bitmap.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.Normalize(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a normalized bitmap by adjusting the borders of the source bitmap according to the specified percentage.
member.remarks: Normalization modifies the visual appearance of the bitmap by adjusting its borders based on the specified percentage. The original bitmap remains unchanged.
member.param: The source bitmap to be normalized. Cannot be null.
The percentage of the border to apply during normalization, expressed as a decimal value. The default is 0.1, representing 10%. Must be greater than or equal to 0.
member.returns: A new SKBitmap instance containing the normalized version of the source bitmap.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.Normalize(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,System.Double)
member.summary: Normalizes the pixel values of the source bitmap and writes the result to the target bitmap, ensuring both bitmaps have the same color type and dimensions.
member.remarks: This method supports normalization for bitmaps with Gray8, Bgra8888, and Rgba8888 color types. Both bitmaps must be compatible in terms of color type, alpha type, and dimensions. The borderPercent parameter allows customization of the border area used in normalization, which may affect the result depending on the image content.
member.param: The source bitmap to normalize. Must not be null and must have the same color type and dimensions as the target bitmap.
The target bitmap where the normalized pixel values will be written. Must not be null and must have the same color type and dimensions as the source bitmap.
The percentage of the border area to consider during normalization, expressed as a value between 0.0 and 1.0. Defaults to 0.1.
member.exception: Thrown if the source and target bitmaps do not have matching color types, alpha types, or dimensions, or if the color type is unsupported.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.NormalizeGray(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Normalizes the grayscale values of the source bitmap and stores the result in the target bitmap.
member.remarks: This method adjusts the grayscale values to fit within the full range of 0 to 255, based on the minimum and maximum values found in the source bitmap. It is important that both source and target bitmaps are of the same size to avoid data corruption.
member.param: The source bitmap containing the grayscale values to be normalized. The bitmap must not be null and should contain valid pixel data.
The target bitmap where the normalized grayscale values will be stored. The bitmap must not be null and should have the same dimensions as the source bitmap.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.NormalizeColor(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,System.Double)
member.summary: Normalizes the color values of the source bitmap and writes the result to the target bitmap using luminance thresholds determined by the specified border percentage.
member.remarks: This method processes the source bitmap by converting RGB values to luminance, building a histogram, and normalizing the color values based on calculated thresholds. It preserves the alpha channel in the target bitmap if present. Use this method to enhance image contrast while maintaining transparency.
member.param: The source bitmap containing the original color values to be normalized.
The target bitmap where the normalized color values will be written.
The percentage of the total pixel count used to determine the minimum and maximum luminance thresholds for normalization. Must be between 0 and 1.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.RgbToGray(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Converts the specified RGB bitmap to a grayscale bitmap.
member.remarks: The method creates a new bitmap with the same dimensions as the source bitmap, using a grayscale color type.
member.param: The source bitmap to be converted to grayscale. Must not be null.
member.returns: A new SKBitmap object representing the grayscale version of the source bitmap.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.RgbToGray(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Converts a bitmap in BGRA8888 or RGBA8888 color format to its grayscale representation using the CCIR-601 formula.
member.remarks: The grayscale conversion uses the CCIR-601 formula, which weights the red, green, and blue channels to produce a perceptually accurate grayscale image. The method does not allocate a new bitmap; it writes the result into the provided target bitmap.
member.param: The source bitmap to convert, which must be in BGRA8888 or RGBA8888 format and have the same dimensions as the target bitmap.
The target bitmap that receives the grayscale output. Must be in Gray8 format and match the dimensions of the source bitmap.
member.returns: The target bitmap containing the grayscale version of the source bitmap.
member.exception: Thrown if the source bitmap is not in BGRA8888 or RGBA8888 format, the target bitmap is not in Gray8 format, or if the dimensions of the source and target bitmaps do not match.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.RgbReverse(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Reverses the red and blue color channels of the specified bitmap image in place.
member.remarks: This method modifies the pixel data of the provided bitmap directly. The operation is thread-safe as the bitmap is locked during processing.
member.param: The bitmap image to process. Must not be null and must have a color type of SKColorType.Bgra8888.
member.exception: Thrown if 's color type is not SKColorType.Bgra8888.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.SKBitmapClone(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Creates a new SKBitmap that is a copy of the specified source bitmap.
member.remarks: The source bitmap is locked during the cloning process to ensure thread safety. The cloned bitmap has the same dimensions and pixel format as the source.
member.param: The source SKBitmap to clone. Cannot be null.
member.returns: A new SKBitmap instance that is an exact copy of the source bitmap. Returns null if the source bitmap is null.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.SKBitmapFromIntPtr(System.IntPtr,SkiaSharp.SKSize,SkiaSharp.SKColorType,SkiaSharp.SKAlphaType)
member.summary: Creates a new SKBitmap instance from a pointer to pixel data, using the specified size, pixel format, and alpha type.
member.remarks: The method copies pixel data directly from unmanaged memory into a new SKBitmap. The caller is responsible for ensuring that the source pointer is valid and that the pixel data matches the specified format and size. Improper use may result in memory access violations.
member.param: A pointer to the source pixel data in memory. The data must be compatible with the specified pixel format and size.
The dimensions of the bitmap to create, represented as an SKSize. Both width and height must be positive values.
The pixel format of the source data, specified as an SKColorType. Determines how the pixel data is interpreted.
The alpha type for the bitmap, specified as an SKAlphaType. Indicates how transparency is handled in the bitmap.
member.returns: An SKBitmap containing the pixel data copied from the specified memory location.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.FillBitmapFromIntPtr(System.IntPtr,SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Copies pixel data from the specified memory location into the provided SKBitmap instance.
member.remarks: This method performs a direct memory copy of pixel data into the target bitmap. It is important to ensure that the source data is compatible with the target bitmap's format and size to avoid data corruption or unexpected results.
member.param: A pointer to the source pixel data in unmanaged memory. The data must match the dimensions and pixel format of the target bitmap.
The SKBitmap object that will be filled with the pixel data from the source pointer.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.SKBitmapToArray(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts the specified SKBitmap to a byte array, optionally including a header with bitmap metadata.
member.remarks: The header consists of 5 bytes: the pixel size (1 byte), the width (2 bytes, little-endian), and the height (2 bytes, little-endian). The position of the header within the array is determined by the value of .
member.param: The source SKBitmap to convert. This parameter must not be null.

A value indicating whether the header containing bitmap metadata is placed at the beginning of the byte array. If set to , the header precedes the pixel data; otherwise, it is appended after the pixel data.
member.returns: A byte array containing the pixel data of the bitmap, along with a 5-byte header that includes pixel size, width, and height information.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.ArrayToSKBitmap(System.Byte[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates an SKBitmap from a byte array containing image pixel data and header information.
member.remarks: The method supports images with pixel formats of 1 byte per pixel (grayscale) and 4 bytes per pixel (BGRA). The byte array must be structured so that the header and pixel data are correctly positioned according to the headerFirst parameter. Supplying an unsupported pixel format or an incorrectly structured array will result in an exception.
member.param: The byte array that contains both the image header and pixel data. The header must include the pixel size and the width and height of the image, encoded in the first or last five bytes depending on the value of headerFirst.
A value indicating whether the header information is located at the beginning of the byte array. If set to true, the header precedes the pixel data; if false, the header follows the pixel data.
member.returns: An SKBitmap instance representing the image constructed from the provided byte array.
member.exception: Thrown if the pixel format specified in the header is not supported.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.SKBitmapProbeGray(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,System.Int32)
member.summary: Samples a grayscale SKBitmap at regular intervals and returns the luminance values as a byte array.
member.param: The source grayscale bitmap to sample. Must be Gray8 format.
The sampling interval in pixels. A step of 2 will sample every other pixel.
member.returns: A byte array containing sampled luminance values.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.SKBitmapProbeColor(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,System.Int32)
member.summary: Samples a color SKBitmap at regular intervals, converts to grayscale, and returns luminance values as a byte array.
member.param: The source color bitmap to sample. Must be Bgra8888 or Rgba8888 format.
The sampling interval in pixels. A step of 2 will sample every other pixel.
member.returns: A byte array containing sampled luminance values converted using CCIR-601 formula.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.SKBitmapProbeColorRgb(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,System.Int32)
member.summary: Samples a color SKBitmap at regular intervals and returns full RGB color data as a byte array.
member.param: The source color bitmap to sample. Must be Bgra8888 or Rgba8888 format.
The sampling interval in pixels. A step of 2 will sample every other pixel.
member.returns: A byte array containing RGB triplets (3 bytes per sampled pixel) in R,G,B order.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.JpegDecodedOK(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified bitmap, presumed to contain a JPEG image, has been decoded correctly by analyzing pixel data consistency across JPEG blocks.
member.remarks: This method checks for differences in pixel data across multiple rows within each JPEG block to detect potential decoding errors. It is intended for use with bitmaps that originate from JPEG images and may not be applicable to other image formats.
member.param: The source bitmap containing the JPEG image to validate. This parameter must not be null.
member.returns: true if the JPEG image appears to be decoded correctly; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.SKBitmapHash(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates a hash value for the specified bitmap by sampling pixel data at defined intervals.
member.remarks: The method locks the bitmap during processing to ensure thread safety. The resulting hash value depends on the sampling interval specified by the parameter; using a larger step may result in a less precise hash.
member.param: The source bitmap from which to compute the hash. This parameter must not be null.
The interval, in bytes, at which to sample pixel values. Must be a positive integer.
member.returns: A hash value represented as an unsigned long integer, derived from the sampled pixel data of the bitmap.

member.name: M:Bwl.Imaging.Skia.UnsafeFunctions.SKBitmapHashIntPtr(System.IntPtr,SkiaSharp.SKSize,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates a hash value for a bitmap represented in unmanaged memory.
member.remarks: This method is intended for scenarios where bitmap data is accessed directly in unmanaged memory. The hash is computed by sampling bytes at the specified interval, which can be used for quick comparisons or change detection. The accuracy and uniqueness of the hash depend on the chosen step value.
member.param: A pointer to the bitmap data in unmanaged memory. This must reference a valid memory location containing the bitmap's bytes.
The dimensions of the bitmap, specified as an SKSize structure representing the width and height.
The number of bytes in a single row of the bitmap, including any padding. Must be greater than zero.
The interval, in bytes, at which to sample the bitmap data when computing the hash. Must be greater than zero.
member.returns: A 64-bit unsigned integer representing the computed hash value of the bitmap data.
